Record comparison
=================

Inputs
------

input1: tests/fixtures/expected/cli_record_root_rel_1.json
input2: tests/fixtures/expected/cli_record_2.json

Summary
-------

  =  Same               1
  ~  Changed            0
  +  Added              0
  -  Removed            1
  !  Undetermined       0
  !  Undetermined       0
  -----------------------
     Total              2

Legend
------

  =  Same           record matched and digest is unchanged
  ~  Changed        record matched but digest changed
  +  Added          record exists only in input2
  -  Removed        record exists only in input1
  !  Undetermined   matcher could not safely pair records

Results
-------

[0001] = SAME
  key:        filename = foo.bar
  input1:     tests/fixtures/foo.bar
  input2:     ../foo.bar
  digest:     9b61116853b99ee97b0ed5d499da7e486d77db52fbc60a2357e5cbf6183d418c

[0002] - REMOVED
  key:        filename = foo2.bar
  input1:     tests/fixtures/foo2.bar
  digest:     99ff9c6740efe27e636aa330624a28f19ee96f5f844d1eee0192590d07e6c245
